steps.title: Compare the orbital periods
steps.content: The goal is to contrast the orbits of Oberon and Miranda. The relevant notes give their average orbital periods: Oberon takes 13.46 Earth days, while Miranda takes 1.41 Earth days.

steps.title: Ignore irrelevant orbit facts
steps.content: Choice B focuses on Kepler's laws instead of contrasting the two moons. Choice C invents a circular orbit for Miranda, which the notes do not support. Choice D says the moons orbit like planets but does not contrast Oberon and Miranda. The answer is A.
